title: LGBTQIA2S+ PEER SUPPORT DROP-IN - 211info
text: MARIE EQUI CENTER LGBTQIA2S+ PEER SUPPORT DROP-IN Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF LGBTQIA2S+ peer drop-in center provides resources, survival and harm reduction supplies, community connection, community health, and basic wound care. Offers peer support and case management to support community members in navigating systems of care, insurance systems, and direct connections to recovery and housing organizations. 4434 SE 25th Avenue Portland, OR 97202 Eligibility: Unhoused and low-income LGBTQIA2S+ community members Hours: Monday-Thursday 10am-4pm. Closed Monday, May 4, 2026-Friday, May 8, 2026 for staff development. Email (503) 459-2584 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 459-2584 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: City of Portland (Multnomah County only) Services: Case/Care Management * LGBTQ2+ Issues Community Clinics * LGBTQ2+ Issues LGBTQ2+ Awareness Training LGBTQ2+ Community Centers LGBTQ2+ Support Groups Specialized Information and Referral * LGBTQ2+ Individuals Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MARIE EQUI CENTER
